name: Group PA cover vs individual PA supplement decision
description: User has employer-provided ₹10L group PA and wants to know if individual PA is needed

input.message: My company gives me group PA cover of ₹10 lakh. Do I need separate individual PA?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response address the group vs individual PA coverage gap analysis?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it explain that group cover is tied to employment and may not cover all scenarios, and suggest top-up based on income multiple?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Does it mention that income replacement adequacy (typically 5-10x annual income) should determine total PA cover needed?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it avoid a definitive 'you must buy' without knowing income and lifestyle details? Disclaimer present?
